commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the shared dispatch predicate so `replyOptions.suppressDefaultToolProgressMessages === true` suppresses default tool/progress messages even when verbose progress is enabled.

PR surface: Source +2. Total +2 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows Telegram can request suppression while the shared dispatcher still lets verbose progress reopen default progress delivery, and the docs define Telegram stream-off as final-only.
